节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability of manage USB device.

节点.return_description: USB device list.

节点.功能描述:
Connects to the USB device based on the device information returned by getDevices().
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevice } device - USB device on the device list returned by getDevices(). It cannot be empty.
@throws { BusinessError } 14400001 - Access right denied. Call requestRight to get the USBDevicePipe access right first.

parameters.说明: USB device on the device list returned by getDevices(). It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: object for data transfer.

error_codes.description: Access right denied. Call requestRight to get the USBDevicePipe access right first.

节点.功能描述:
Checks whether the application has the permission to access the device.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceName - device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.
@returns { boolean } indicates if the user has the permission to access the device.

parameters.说明: device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: indicates if the user has the permission to access the device.

节点.功能描述:
Requests the permission for a given application to access the USB device. The system application has access to the device by default, and there is no need to call this interface to apply.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceName - device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.
@returns { Promise<boolean> } indicates if the device access permissions are granted.

parameters.说明: device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: indicates if the device access permissions are granted.

节点.功能描述:
Remove the permission for a given application to access the USB device. The system application has access to the device by default, and calling this interface will not have any impact.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceName - device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.
@returns { boolean } indicates if the device access permissions are removed.

parameters.说明: device name defined by USBDevice.name. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: indicates if the device access permissions are removed.

节点.功能描述:
Claims a USB interface.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevicePipe } pipe - device pipe, which is used to determine the bus number and device address. It cannot be empty.
@param { USBInterface } iface - USB interface, which is used to determine the interface to claim. It cannot be empty.
@param { boolean } [force] - optional parameter that determines whether to forcibly claim the USB interface.
@returns { number } returns **0** if the USB interface is successfully claimed; returns an error code otherwise.

parameters.说明: device pipe, which is used to determine the bus number and device address. It cannot be empty.
USB interface, which is used to determine the interface to claim. It cannot be empty.
boolean } [force] - optional parameter that determines whether to forcibly claim the USB interface.

节点.return_description: returns **0** if the USB interface is successfully claimed; returns an error code otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Releases a USB interface.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevicePipe } pipe - device pipe, which is used to determine the bus number and device address. It cannot be empty.
@param { USBInterface } iface - USB interface, which is used to determine the interface to release. It cannot be empty.
@returns { number } returns **0** if the USB interface is successfully released; returns an error code otherwise.

parameters.说明: device pipe, which is used to determine the bus number and device address. It cannot be empty.
USB interface, which is used to determine the interface to release. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: returns **0** if the USB interface is successfully released; returns an error code otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the device configuration.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevicePipe } pipe - device pipe, which is used to determine the bus number and device address. It cannot be empty.
@param { USBConfiguration } config - device configuration. It cannot be empty.
@returns { number } returns **0** if the device configuration is successfully set; returns an error code otherwise.

parameters.说明: device pipe, which is used to determine the bus number and device address. It cannot be empty.
device configuration. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: returns **0** if the device configuration is successfully set; returns an error code otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Sets a USB interface.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevicePipe } pipe - device pipe, which is used to determine the bus number and device address. It cannot be empty.
@param { USBInterface } iface - USB interface, which is used to determine the interface to set. It cannot be empty.
@returns { number } returns **0** if the USB interface is successfully set; return an error code otherwise.

parameters.说明: device pipe, which is used to determine the bus number and device address. It cannot be empty.
USB interface, which is used to determine the interface to set. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: returns **0** if the USB interface is successfully set; return an error code otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the raw USB descriptor.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevicePipe } pipe - device pipe, which is used to determine the bus number and device address. It cannot be empty.
@returns { Uint8Array } returns the raw descriptor data.

parameters.说明: device pipe, which is used to determine the bus number and device address. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: returns the raw descriptor data.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the file descriptor.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevicePipe } pipe - device pipe, which is used to determine the USB device. It cannot be empty.
@returns { number } returns the file descriptor of the USB device.

parameters.说明: device pipe, which is used to determine the USB device. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: returns the file descriptor of the USB device.

节点.功能描述:
Performs control transfer. return -1 if an exception occurs.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevicePipe } pipe - device pipe, which is used to determine the USB device. It cannot be empty.
@param { USBControlParams } controlparam - control transfer parameters. It cannot be empty.
@param { number } [timeout] - timeout duration. This parameter is optional. The default value is **0**, indicating no timeout.
@returns { Promise<number> } returns the size of the transmitted or received data block if the control transfer is successful;

parameters.说明: device pipe, which is used to determine the USB device. It cannot be empty.
control transfer parameters. It cannot be empty.
number } [timeout] - timeout duration. This parameter is optional. The default value is **0**, indicating no timeout.

节点.return_description: returns the size of the transmitted or received data block if the control transfer is successful;

节点.功能描述:
Performs usb control transfer. return -1 if an exception occurs.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevicePipe } pipe - device pipe, which is used to determine the USB device. It cannot be empty.
@param { USBDeviceRequestParams } requestparam - control transfer parameters. It cannot be empty.
@param { number } [timeout] - timeout duration. This parameter is optional. The default value is **0**, indicating no timeout.
@returns { Promise<number> } returns the size of the transmitted or received data block if the control transfer is successful;

parameters.说明: device pipe, which is used to determine the USB device. It cannot be empty.
control transfer parameters. It cannot be empty.
number } [timeout] - timeout duration. This parameter is optional. The default value is **0**, indicating no timeout.

节点.return_description: returns the size of the transmitted or received data block if the control transfer is successful;

节点.功能描述:
Performs bulk transfer. return -1 if an exception occurs.
1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevicePipe } pipe - device pipe, which is used to determine the USB device. It cannot be empty.
@param { USBEndpoint } endpoint - USB endpoint, which is used to determine the USB port for data transfer. It cannot be empty.
@param { Uint8Array } buffer - buffer for writing or reading data. It cannot be empty.
@param { number } [timeout] - timeout duration. This parameter is optional. The default value is **0**, indicating no timeout.
@returns { Promise<number> } the size of the transmitted or received data block if the control transfer is successful;

parameters.说明: device pipe, which is used to determine the USB device. It cannot be empty.
USB endpoint, which is used to determine the USB port for data transfer. It cannot be empty.
buffer for writing or reading data. It cannot be empty.
number } [timeout] - timeout duration. This parameter is optional. The default value is **0**, indicating no timeout.

节点.return_description: the size of the transmitted or received data block if the control transfer is successful;

节点.功能描述:
Closes a USB device pipe.

2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { USBDevicePipe } pipe - device pipe, which is used to determine the USB device. It cannot be empty.
@returns { number } returns **0** if the USB device pipe is closed successfully; return an error code otherwise.

parameters.说明: device pipe, which is used to determine the USB device. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: returns **0** if the USB device pipe is closed successfully; return an error code otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Checks whether the application has the right to access the USB accessory.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameter types.
1. No accessory is plugged in.
注释信息: @param { USBAccessory } accessory - USB accessory. It cannot be empty.
@returns { boolean } indicates if the user has the right to access the USB accessory.
@throws { BusinessError } 14401001 - The target USBAccessory not matched.

parameters.说明: USB accessory. It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: indicates if the user has the right to access the USB accessory.

parameters.说明: USB accessory. It cannot be empty.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the accessory handle and opens accessory file descriptor.

节点.功能描述: Represents the USB endpoint from which data is sent or received. You can obtain the USB endpoint through USBInterface.
Maximum size of data packets on the endpoint
Unique ID defined by USBInterface.id, which indicates the interface to which the endpoint belongs
Represents a USB interface. One config can contain multiple **USBInterface** instances, each providing a specific function.
Unique ID of the USB interface
Alternation between descriptors of the same USB interface
USBEndpoint that belongs to the USB interface
USB configuration. One USBDevice can contain multiple USBConfiguration instances.
Unique ID of the USB configuration
Configuration name, which can be left empty
Represents a USB device pipe, which is used to determine the USB device.
Data written to or read from the buffer
Word index of the parameter value
Word length of the parameter value
Data written to or read from the buffer
Request for writing data from the host to the device
Request for reading data from the device to the host
The manufacturer name of the accessory.
The user visible description of the accessory.
The serial number of the accessory.
The file descriptor of the accessory.The valid USBAccessoryHandle.accessoryFd is a positive value.
Automatically free transfer after callback returns
Transmissions that are multiples of wMaxPacketSize will add an additional zero packet.
For bulk/interrupt endpoints: halt condition detected (endpoint stalled). For control endpoints: control request not supported.
Device sent more data than requested
Isochronous packet descriptors, only for isochronous transfers.
Length of data to request in this packet
Amount of data that was actually transferred
Actual length of data that was transferred. Read-only, and only for use within transfer callback function. Not valid for isochronous endpoint transfers.
The status of the transfer. Read-only, and only for use within transfer callback function.
Isochronous packet descriptors, for isochronous transfers only.
As a generic USB data transfer interface. The Client populates this interface and submits it in order to request a transfer.
Pipe of the device that this data transfer will be submitted to.
A bitwise OR combination of UsbTransferFlags.
Address of the endpoint where this transfer will be sent.
Timeout for this transfer in milliseconds. A value of 0 indicates no timeout.
Length of the data buffer. Must be non-negative.
Callback function. This will be invoked when the transfer completes, fails, or is canceled.
User context data. Useful for associating specific data to a transfer that can be accessed from within the callback function.
Count of isochronous packets. Only used for I/O with isochronous endpoints. Must be non-negative.

Submit USB data transfer. submits it in order to request a transfer
1. The transfer has already been submitted.
2. The interface is claimed by another program or driver.
1. Memory allocation failed.
注释信息: @param { transfer } As a generic USB data transfer interface. The Client populates this interface and
@throws { BusinessError } 14400001 - Access right denied. Call requestRight to get the USBDevicePipe access right first.
@throws { BusinessError } 14400008 - No such device (it may have been disconnected).

parameters.说明: a generic USB data transfer interface. The Client populates this interface and

error_codes.description: Access right denied. Call requestRight to get the USBDevicePipe access right first.
No such device (it may have been disconnected).

节点.功能描述:
Cancel USB data transfer.
1.Unrecognized discard error code.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 14400001 - Access right denied. Call requestRight to get the USBDevicePipe access right first.
@throws { BusinessError } 14400008 - No such device (it may have been disconnected).
@throws { BusinessError } 14400010 - Other USB error. Possible causes:
@throws { BusinessError } 14400011 - The transfer is not in progress, or is already complete or cancelled.

parameters.说明: the target transfer

error_codes.description: Access right denied. Call requestRight to get the USBDevicePipe access right first.
No such device (it may have been disconnected).
The transfer is not in progress, or is already complete or cancelled.

节点.功能描述:
Perform a USB port reset to reinitialize a usb device. The operation will attempt to restore the previous configuration and alternate interface settings after the reset has completed.
1.Unrecognized discard error code.
1.The input parameters fail the validation check.
2.The call chain used to obtain the input parameters is not reasonable.
注释信息: @param { USBDevicePipe } pipe - Represents a USB device,which is the target object to be restarted.It cannot be empty.
@returns { boolean } If the restart operation is successful, return {@code true}; if the restart operation fails, return {@code false}.
@throws { BusinessError } 14400001 - Access right denied. Call requestRight to get the USBDevicePipe access right first.
@throws { BusinessError } 14400004 -Service exception. Possible causes: 1. No accessory is plugged in.
@throws { BusinessError } 14400008 - No such device(it may have been disconnected)
@throws { BusinessError } 14400010 - Other USB error. Possible causes:
@throws { BusinessError } 14400013 - The USBDevicePipe validity check failed. Possible causes:

parameters.说明: Represents a USB device,which is the target object to be restarted.It cannot be empty.

节点.return_description: If the restart operation is successful, return {@code true}; if the restart operation fails, return {@code false}.

error_codes.description: Access right denied. Call requestRight to get the USBDevicePipe access right first.
Service exception. Possible causes: 1. No accessory is plugged in.
No such device(it may have been disconnected)
The USBDevicePipe validity check failed. Possible causes:
